commands.review_summary:
Updates local development/worktree documentation and PR validation guidance, adds dev worktree/seeding specs, and adds public-corpus seed retry coverage plus worktree seed-failure cleanup.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is primarily a documentation/dev-tooling reconciliation PR, not a reported runtime bug with a current-main failing reproduction path. The seed retry path is source-reviewable, but I did not run the local Convex workflow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the Worktrunk contract; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: docs: reconcile local dev worktree workflows
target.body:
## Summary

- Document the current Worktrunk worktree path across AGENTS, README, CONTRIBUTING, and a new maintainer spec.
- Make `seed:dev` the documented default seed path, with lower-level public-corpus commands documented for recovery/corpus work.
- Align the PR template and contributor validation docs with the current `ci:*` gates.
- Add retry coverage for transient Convex public-corpus batch write conflicts and stop managed children when seed-only exits on failure.

Closes #2325.

## Verification

- `bun run validate:public-corpus`
- `bunx vitest run scripts/public-corpus/seed-public-corpus.test.ts scripts/public-corpus/validate.test.ts scripts/dev-worktree.test.ts`
- Worktree smoke: `bun run setup:worktree`, `bun run dev:worktree`, `wt --yes url`, local URL returned 200, `wt --yes stop`
- `bun run seed:dev`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
